name: Weights & Zenmaisures
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>揺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>れる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>発</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぜん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>条</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>秤</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばかり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 2 face-up "Wind-Up" monsters you control with different Levels; your opponent chooses 1 of them, and the Level of the other monster becomes the same as the chosen monster's, until the End Phase. Then, if your opponent chose the monster with a lower Level, you can draw 1 card.
eff: Target 2 face-up "Wind-Up" monsters you control with different Levels; your opponent chooses 1 of them, and the Level of the other monster becomes the same as the chosen monster's, until the End Phase. Then, if your opponent chose the monster with a lower Level, you can draw 1 card.
